questions.question_text: Transform: 'Traditional music defines a nation's identity, not its borders.' into a Cleft Sentence emphasizing 'music'.
options: It is music that defines a nation's identity...
Music is what defines a nation's identity...
It was music which defined identity...
questions.correct_answer: It is music that defines a nation's identity...
questions.explanation: vurgulanmak istenen öge 'It is... that' arasına alınır.

questions.question_text: What I need ______ (be) a long holiday away from technology.
It was ______ 1980 that the law was finally changed.
questions.explanation: Zaman vurgulu Cleft yapısında edat kullanımı.

questions.question_text: Rewrite 'I love the culture of Japan' using a 'What' cleft structure.
options: What I love is the culture of Japan.
It is the culture of Japan that I love.
The culture of Japan is what I love.
questions.correct_answer: What I love is the culture of Japan.
questions.explanation: 'What' ile başlayan yapı nesneyi vurgulamak için kullanılır.

questions.question_text: All I want ______ (be) for you to listen.
questions.explanation: 'All' ile başlayan Cleft yapısı tekillik bildirir.

questions.question_text: Hangi cümle 'Benim hatamdı' vurgusu yapar? (Cleft structure)
options: It was I who made the mistake.
The mistake was made by me.
questions.correct_answer: It was I who made the mistake.
questions.explanation: Özneyi vurgulayan en sofistike Cleft yapısı budur.

questions.question_text: ______ happened was that the car ran out of fuel.
questions.explanation: Olayı vurgulamak için 'What happened' kalıbı kullanılır.

questions.question_text: Rewrite 'She values honesty above all' using 'It is...'
options: It is honesty that she values above all.
Valuing honesty is what she does.
questions.correct_answer: It is honesty that she values above all.

questions.question_text: The person ______ told me about the ritual was a local elder.
It wasn't until midnight ______ we finally arrived.
questions.explanation: 'It wasn't until... that' zaman kısıtlı vurgu kalıbıdır.

questions.question_text: The reason ______ I left was the lack of cultural respect.
It ______ precisely because of her heritage that she chose this path.

questions.explanation: Cleft (What she did) ve Emphatic Do (She did leave) vurgu sağlar.

questions.question_text: Is it ______ you are looking for?
The thing ______ surprises me most is his tolerance.
